name: Pagoda Fruit Crisp
recipeIngredient: Seasonal fruit, sectioned, skinned, and pitted
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry the wonton wrappers in the least amount of peanut oil possible until they are crispy. Remove from the oil and place on a paper towel to drain.
2. Place one layer of fried wonton wrappers on a serving plate with the skin side facing up.
3. Arrange seasonal fruit in any pleasing design over the first layer of fried wonton wrappers.
4. Add dollops of whipped cream in spots over the fruit.
5. Place another layer of slightly smaller, crispy wonton wrappers on top of the fruit and whipped cream, offsetting the corners from the first layer.
6. Continue adding more fruit and a final dollop of whipped cream to the second layer.
7. Garnish as desired and serve.
Source: Martin Yan's Cooking for Two Show - 1994
: KQED - PBS Productions, San Francisco
